# Car Loan After Bankruptcy -- How to Buy a Car & Get Financing [2026] -- Car After BK
> How to buy a car after bankruptcy. Rebuild credit, find financing, avoid predatory lenders, and get approved. Complete 2026 auto loan guide.

## About
buyacarafterbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.
